user.title: Connect to Nimblist
user.description: Enter your Nimblist server URL and an API token. Create a token in the Nimblist web app under Settings → API tokens.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect to Nimblist
reauth_confirm.description: Your API token is no longer valid. Enter a new one to reconnect.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Nimblist server.

abort.already_configured: This Nimblist account is already configured.
abort.reauth_account_mismatch: That API token belongs to a different Nimblist account. Use a token for the account you are reconnecting.
